retrieved_result: What Does a Snake Symbolize? \"World View Symbolism Q: What Does a Snake Symbolize? A: Quick Answer The snake symbolizes healing, transformation and life changes and typically appears in a person's life when he needs spiritual guidance. The snake is also a spirit animal that is connected to the life force or primal energy inside\"

history.title: What Does a Snake Symbolize?
history.description: "World View Symbolism Q: What Does a Snake Symbolize? A: Quick Answer The snake symbolizes healing, transformation and life changes and typically appears in a person's life when he needs spiritual guidance. The snake is also a spirit animal that is connected to the life force or primal energy inside
